title: Modernize task after advisory responses
goal: Reconcile accepted/rejected recommendations, update the actual task definition, identify Owner decisions, identify blockers.
scope: Update task candidate based on accepted recommendations
Update stage map draft if needed
non_goals: Do not skip Owner decision gates
owner_intent: Produce a traceable modernization record that shows which advisory recommendations were accepted, rejected, or need Owner decision.
risks: Missing Owner decision on contested recommendations
Stale advisory input used after Git truth has moved
open_questions: Which recommendations require Owner decision vs auto-accept?
How to handle conflicting recommendations from multiple advisors?
Should modernization trigger stage map revision?
no_fake_green_note: Modernization does not prove stage map is approved or implementation is ready.
